column7: ANALYSIS

column6: Effect
column7: Description

column6:
Ability kills grant Devour
Devour gives 140 HP on activation, lasts 10-15s, and gives 15-40% grenade and 5-8s duration on kill
column7: only remaining unnerfed Devour source left, also great grenade regen built-in

column6:
Bolt Charge on jolted enemy kill
22m jolting uppercut on slide melee, 75% DR for 4s after usage
column7: insanely OP DR with Combination Blow

column6:
Void ability damage and volatile explosions apply volatile
Volatile explosions restore 90 HP to allies within 40m of user
column7: probably the strongest sustained chunk healing in the game

column6:
60 slow stacks to enemies within 9m for 8-12s on dodge
+300% class regen for 3s on slow
50% DR for 4s on dodge
column7: essentially permanent 50% DR and free Courage application on a non-boss scale

column6:
4 stack buff (sword, melee, glaive melee, finisher, super light)
+100% melee, 40% Bladefury, 10% sword damage (20% self)
15s base, 24s max, 2.5-1s healing pulse rate based on stacks
column7: only aspect that gives stackable weapon boost, also good sustain and melee damage

column6: Airborne air move consumes class ability (triggers effects) and amplifies allies and jolts enemies within 10m
column7: 100% teamwide Amplified uptime while triggering class ability effects

column6:
Solar ability kills, scorched kills, and Hammer of Sol impacts make refreshable Sunspots for 12s
Restoration x1 for 5-7.5s, 100% grenade/melee regen inside
column7: constant Restoration access, chainable staggering ticks on adds, passive ability regen

column6:
50-100 HP, regen start, and Amplified on melee kill
+160% melee damage, unpowered conversion, 6m lunge for 6s on shield break or sub 30% target damage
column7: free Amplified and chunk healing on melee kills, universal melee damage boost

column6: Air move toggles Weavewalk while airborne, giving 90% DR, perched Threadling every 0.5s, costs 25% melee per second, and disables weapons, abilities, etc., Woven Mail to allies on exit (2-20s)
column7: excellent response strategy for survivability in low power content

column6:
Sliding powered melee creates igniting slam on recast
25% non-melee DR during animation
column7: has strong intangibles but doesn't have any outstanding special effects

column6:
Debuffed kills give invisibility (8-11.2s) and truesight (4s), with invisibility going on cooldown for 2s after wearing off
Melees deal +300% damage, weaken for 5s, have more range
column7: invisibility not as high value any more, melee damage bonus is situational

column6:
Spawns strand decoy on dodge that attracts attacks, lasts 12s, and explodes and spawns 2 Threadlings on destruction
0.6x class regen while equipped
column7: high uptime and deaggro source, very easy to use

column6:
10 stack buff in 15m for 12s (crit kill/HC crit: 2, dodge: 1, crit: 1)
15-45? reload, 5-50 Weapons, 0.95x-0.85x? reload duration
Cure on kill at 10 stacks
column7: high utility for fireteam damage, provides pseudo-Devour effect

column6:
6 stack explosive with 6s ICD that replaces grenade (weapon: 1, ignition/scorch: 3, ability: 4, super: 6)
Bigger ignition + submunitions if shot, otherwise detonates 3s after throw
column7: splash damage outlier even though doesn't provide much consistency

column6:
Bolt Charge x4 to allies on class ability cast (x6 for thruster)
Barricade gives Bolt Charge (no Frequency doubling) over time and allows for weapon discharge at max stacks
column7: free fireteam damage, but very one-dimensional use case

column6:
3 pulses that give Woven Mail and 15 HP on Tangle destruction
Woven Mail to allies on super cast
+300% melee regen during Woven Mail
column7: solid survivability with 10s Woven Mail source, great uptime from melee regen

column6:
Melee hits on jolted enemies apply blind
Jolting 7m range aftershock melees, double damage light attack on Arc Staff after dodge
column7: Blind application generally not relevant, aftershock damage just okay

column6: Sliding jolting powered melee that grants hit-based Bolt Charge and Amplified, gives %DR for ?s on usage
column7: straightforward splash melee aspect, more risky and less consistent vs. Consecration

column6:
3 stack buff for 20s (ability kills and ignitions)
20-73% non-melee ability damage (67-200% melee)
Unpowered conversion and 30-40 scorch on melee
column7: strong ability damage buff and forgiving timer but not very versatile

column6: Firebolt gets 50% radius and 5 enemies, solar gets 2s duration and magma blobs, fusion gets 2 explosions, and healing gets Cure x2 and Restoration x2 for 4-6s
column7: like Touch of Thunder, damage/Restoration x2 specialist but not as applicable

column6: Flashbang blinds after first bounce, lightning has 2 charges and jolts on every tick past 1st, pulses make Ionic Traces every 1s and ramp damage, storms roam after detonation
column7: meta for grenade damage, but zero survivability or utility outside buffing grenades

column6: Grapple melee makes 3 Threadlings, Threadling consume makes 5 perched Threadlings, shackle consume gives Weaver's Trance for 25s (suspending explosion on kills)
column7: best combination of suspend CC with offense, technically best Threadling spam

column6:
Freezing 12m seeker on enemy shatter
8s ICD after 7 seekers
column7: insane chain CC spread, not very offensive but great ability efficiency, build-dependent

column6:
Spawns tracking vortex upon Tangle destruction
Vortex unravels targets on kill, triggering Tangle effects
Can be grappled to
column7: pretty solid splash with lingering stagger effects, also QoL with grapple point

column6:
Class ability spawns solar turret for 20s
3 shot ignition with Ashes, 4 without (no grenade scaling)
column7: high uptime stagger source that takes low CD ability instead of grenade/melee

column6:
Grenade cooldown changed to glacier
Charged grenade deploys stasis turret
Turret applies 20 slow on hit and lasts 25-30s
column7: reliable CC option, helps "soften" targets in the way Hellion does

column6:
3 Threadlings and perched deployment on class ability cast
Damage/kill counter that adds perched Threadlings with 2s ICD
10% class energy on Threadling hit
column7: passive damage and class regen, very background

column6:
Sliding powered melee knocks enemies away, consumes 50% per cast, and launches barrages of unraveling projectiles
25% DR against non-melee during animation
column7: ranged but definitely lacking in power compared to other powered melee aspects

column6: 6 stack 15s turret with 6s ICD that replaces grenade (weapon: 1, ability: 2), blinding on impact and chaining lightning at enemies within 16m, granting Bolt Charge stacks on hit
column7: like Bleak Watcher but does damage and synergizes with Arc sandbox

column6:
Spawns 7s ICD lance on stasis or ability kill
Lance can be thrown or slammed, freezing and giving x2 Frost Armor to allies on impact (slam only)
column7: gameplay loop is too slow and non-lethal, but decent Frost Armor source

column6: Charged grenade makes blinding void shield for 3s with 95% DR, releases response damage upon depletion, makes orbs every 4.5s every 10 damage taken on Sentinel Shield
column7: best get-out-of-jail card in the game, but tied to long CD

column6: Dodge animation travels further and gives invisibility for 5-7s
column7: shorter invisibility CD vs. Trapper's with better synergies

column6:
Suspending dive air move, triggers class ability usage effects
Woven Mail for 4s for each suspended enemy, up to 20s
column7: very consistent Woven Mail source, suspend not as relevant in current sandbox

column6:
Small Stasis Shard on crystal or enemy shatter
x1-3 Frost Armor and 10-? HP from shard pickup
column7: best of the harvest aspects, but still forces shard gameplay loop

column6:
Rifts grant allies Arc Souls
+40-120% class regen near allies (up to 3)
Amplified boosts Arc Soul fire rate by 2.25x
column7: overshadowed by Getaway Artist and damage benefit isn't substantial in full teams

column6:
45 HP Void Overshield to allies on super cast or barricade cast
Barricades regen 11 Void Overshield HP/s
column7: best teamwide Void Overshield applicator, but tied to long CD

column6:
Powered melee kills refund if Radiant
Marksman Golden Gun is 4s longer, Deadshot Golden Gun gets 15% DR, Blade Barrage gains 3 knives per fan
column7: refunds a variety of melees that aren't very potent

column6:
Ionic Trace on Arc ability and Arc debuffed kills
Ionic Traces grant Amplified
column7: good elemental pickup but doesn't affect endgame outside spammability

column6:
Grants additional grenade charge
Grapples make grapple points that grant allies grapple ability
column7: consistency pick for Cyrt synergy and grapple point creation

column6:
Stasis debuffed kills spawn Stasis Shard (size based on rank)
x1-3 Frost Armor and 10-? HP from shard pickup
column7: core shard spam aspect, but shard gameplay loop isn't very endgame-appealing

column6:
Additional melee charge
Sliding powered melee creates 8 crystal wave uppercut
column7: much worse individually vs. better powered melee aspects, needs Tectonic pairing

column6: Overcharge grenades: axions: +2 seekers and 25% damage, scatter: +4 projectiles, tracking, 25% damage, vortex: 7.5% duration, 70% radius, enhanced pull, others: creates volatile HHSN blast
column7: overcharge tradeoff + lack of class-leading options for damage and other purposes

column6:
Grants a weakening invisibility dive that uses melee charge
Dive leaves smoke cloud that weakens and damages
Snare bomb gives invisibility to allies for 5-7s
column7: not really relevant any more outside of pure stealth scenarios

column6:
Deployable weakening Void Soul for 25s on rift cast
Healing or empowering drain give 4% grenade/melee or 25 HP every 1.4s, and drained kills give 10-50% class
column7: solid debuff extension but more fruitful ability regen options exist

column6:
Weapon and abilities can be used while gliding
20-50% melee from airborne kills
Cure x2 for allies on consumption, 5-15s duration on aerial kill
column7: good for movement and QoL for in-air shooting, dated Restoration x2 source

column6: 2 throws in Sentinel Shield, unpowered conversion that gives 10 HP Void Overshield, +400% grenade regen, +160% melee damage, 5.5m lunge with Void Overshield active
column7: consistency problems in low power content, effects comparable to better uptime aspects

column6:
Grants 4s ICD vertical dive that shatters crystals and enemies
Increased shatter damage
Frost Armor on crystal or enemy shatter
column7: QoL Frost Armor source, but still mostly just a movement option

column6: Coldsnap seekers duplicate on freeze and spawn crystals on chain detonations, duskfield gets 50% radius and crystal inside, glacier becomes a heptagon
column7: extremely one-dimensional aspect, effect is quite niche

column6:
Entering invisibility marks a random non-boss target
Killing target creates ally-cloaking weakening smoke cloud and gives reload and ability energy (3 stacks, 7s)
column7: spree requirement too strict for endgame, walking to smoke clouds also potentially risky

column6:
Amplified on jolted enemy kill
+200% class regen, +50 reload, 0.8x reload duration, and 66% DR during dodge while Amplified
column7: QoL effects but Amplified trigger and dodge DR not very applicable

column6:
Grants horizontal dash with 4s ICD
Two dashes with Heat Rises
Cure x1 on standard 3 kill counter within 5s
column7: QoL movement choice with physics immunity frames, consistency pick

column6:
Stasis Shard near enemy on freeze (scales with enemy type)
x1-3 Frost Armor and 10-? HP from shard pickup
column7: least consistent harvest aspect

column6: Tracking 30m suspending lash on barricade cast
column7: suspend focus on long CD, also mediocre value without Abeyant

column6: 50 HP overshield (Amplified 33% DR, 60% splash DR, 10% general DR) that gives Bolt Charge per hit absorbed while sprinting with full class energy, fully depletes class on destruction
column7: fairly tanky overshield but uptime too poor and sprint requirement annoying

column6:
Suspending blast on Tangle destruction
Tangles are unaffected by Gravity and seek/attach to enemies
Threadling kills spawn Tangles
column7: tradeoffs against normal tangle (delayed detonation) and suspend on long CD

column6:
8.5m freezing pulse and +2.5m lunge for 1.2s on rift cast
11% class energy on freeze
column7: basically just for PvP cheese

column6: 2s ICD +50% distance slide and instant shatter on slide collision
column7: basically just for PvP movement
